assertions.description: INCORRECT: The connectivity section reports 1 unrouted net named 'unconnected-(J100-Pad6)' with 8 pads, all listed as 'J100.6'. This is a data integrity issue: a single pad cannot appear 8 times in the same net. J100 is a USB Micro-B connector with a 17-pad footprint. The repeated pad reference likely indicates a bug in how the PCB analyzer resolves pad net assignments for multi-pin pads or shield/GND pads on the USB connector footprint.
